description_long: This object is a piece of sushi featuring a rectangular block of white rice at the base, topped with a thick slice of orange-pink salmon. A dark green strip of nori seaweed wraps vertically around the center, securing the salmon to the rice. The sushi is presented on a glossy, dark brown rectangular platform that resembles a serving board or tray. Two wooden chopsticks are placed alongside the sushi, their position varying in each view. The salmon has visible marbling, and the rice appears slightly textured, while the nori has a subtle sheen. No additional garnishes or toppings are present on the sushi itself.
description: A rectangular salmon sushi with a nori seaweed band, set on a glossy brown tray with wooden chopsticks. The sushi features marbled salmon atop white rice, with no visible garnishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nori band centered on the sushi, with chopsticks placed behind the sushi on the tray.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the marbled salmon and rice layers, with chopsticks resting diagonally on the tray's right side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the nori band visible and chopsticks laid horizontally across the tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with salmon and rice layers visible, chopsticks positioned diagonally on the left side of the tray.
